results.title: Software Testing Tutorial For Beginners | Manual & Automation Testing | Selenium Training | Edureka
results.reason: Comprehensive hour-long session that bridges manual to automation concepts, highly rated for its structured curriculum approach.
summary: Learn the basics of manual and automated testing
Understand why we need to test software products
Discover how to use tools like Selenium effectively
See how testing fits into the development cycle

results.title: Roadmap to QA/Automation Tester | How To Become an Automation Tester | Where & How To start?
results.reason: Highly praised by the QA community for providing a realistic, actionable roadmap that explains the 'how to start' phase perfectly.
summary: Follow a clear path to become a tester
Learn which programming languages you should study first
Find the best tools for building your career
Get tips on how to start your journey

results.title: Automation Testing Tutorial for Beginners | Software Testing Certification Training | Edureka
results.reason: A more condensed version of the Edureka masterclass focusing specifically on certification-aligned automation basics.
summary: Understand the main benefits of using automation tools
Learn how to choose the right testing software
See how to write your first automated script
Explore different types of automated testing methods

results.title: Software Testing Explained in 100 Seconds
results.reason: The best 'big picture' introduction available; extremely high clarity and speed for someone who knows nothing about testing.
summary: Learn what software testing is in simple terms
Understand the difference between bugs and features
See why testing saves time and money later
Discover common ways developers check their own code

results.title: Automation Testing Tutorial for Beginners
results.reason: Excellent high-level conceptual overview that defines 'what' and 'why' clearly for absolute beginners in a short timeframe.
summary: Learn when to switch from manual to automation
Understand the basic steps of the testing process
See how to pick tasks for automated tools
Discover how to make testing faster and easier
